title: NW FURNITURE BANK - 211info
text: NW FURNITURE BANK VANCOUVER NW FURNITURE BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and delivers gently used furniture, including dining tables, chairs, coffee and end tables, desks, nightstands, easy chairs, sofas, dressers, and bookshelves. Bed frames may be available; mattresses and box springs are not included but can be purchased at a special client rate through the retail store. Available items vary depending on inventory 13503 SE Mill Plain Boulevard #114 Vancouver, WA 98684 Eligibility: By referral only. Low-income individuals or families. Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (360) 787-7141 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (360) 787-7141 Damian Sanchez [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: A referral from a participating community partner is required. Visit the website or call for more information; the delivery service area is 20 miles from the store location. FEES: $100 non-refundable processing fee. Additional $150 for delivery service. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: C-Tran: The Vine on Mill Plain Services: Furniture Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
